Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: The user wants me to analyze an event log based on two sets of rules Normative Process Behavior strict rules and Desiderata recommended but not strict

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Part 1 Normative Rules Strict Sequence Application Received to Credit Check to Risk Assessment to Loan Decision to Inform Applicant to If Approved Finalize Documentation to Close Case Ordering Credit Check before Risk Assessment Risk Assessment before Loan Decision Inform Applicant after Loan Decision If Approved Finalize Documentation before Close Case If Rejected NO Finalize Documentation before Close Case Not allowed Skipping changing order Finalize Doc after rejection closing without following decision logic

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Part 2 Desiderata Recommended Credit Check within 24 hours of Application Received Inform Applicant within 48 hours of Loan Decision Follow up Call before Close Case encouraged not required

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Case 1 Application Received Credit Check 0 5 hrs after App Rec meets 24h desideratum Risk Assessment after CC OK Loan Decision Approved after RA OK Inform Applicant 2 hrs after LD meets 48h desideratum Finalize Documentation Approved so required OK Close Case after FD OK Follow up call Missing Desiderata violation but not strict Normative Violations None Desiderata Violations Missing Follow up Call

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Case 2 Application Received Risk Assessment Before CC Normative violation CC must be before RA Credit Check Loan Decision Rejected Finalize Documentation Rejected so NOT allowed Normative violation Inform Applicant is MISSING in Case 2 Normative violations for Case 2 Risk Assessment before Credit Check Ordering violation Inform Applicant is skipped Skipping activity violation Finalize Documentation performed after a Rejection Contradictory action violation

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Case 3 Application Received Credit Check 49 hours later Desiderata violation Risk Assessment after CC OK Loan Decision Approved after RA OK Inform Applicant 51 hours after LD Desiderata violation Finalize Documentation Approved so required OK Close Case after FD OK Follow up call Missing Desiderata violation Normative Violations None

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: Wait where is Inform Applicant Ah 10 30 is Close Case Let me check the log again Yes Inform Applicant is MISSING

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Normative Violations Strict Rules Case 2 is the only case violating the strict normative rules It commits three distinct violations Ordering Violation Risk Assessment was performed before the Credit Check Skipping Violation The Inform Applicant activity is completely missing Contradictory Action Violation Finalize Documentation was executed after a Loan Decision Rejected Cases 1 and 3 fully comply with all normative constraints

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Desiderata Violations Recommended Best Practices Case 1 Fails to perform a Follow up Call before closing the case Case 2 Fails to perform a Follow up Call Case 3 Credit Check Timing occurred 49 hours after the Application was received Inform Applicant Timing occurred 51 hours after the Loan Decision Follow up Call missing Clarify that these are suboptimal but not severe

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Case 1 Smooth automated or well managed manual process just missed the optional follow up maybe due to workload or applicant unavailability

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Case 2 Highly problematic case Could be due to system errors untrained staff or a rushed manual override that bypassed system checks The finalization of documentation for a rejected loan might be a clerical error or a system bug

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Case 3 The delays align with a weekend Application received Friday morning Credit check done Sunday morning Informing applicant on Tuesday afternoon possibly due to backlog or holiday Missing follow up call is a minor omission

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Lets double check the dates and timings Jan 12 is Friday Jan 14 is Sunday Jan 16 is Tuesday Credit check gap 49 hours correct Inform applicant gap 51 hours correct
